# PERF-048 positive: bytes.Equal on long inputs in a hot path
lang: go
file: PERF-048-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"bytes"
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

func Match(c *gin.Context) {
	body := c.Request.Body
	buf := make([]byte, 1024)
	n, _ := body.Read(buf)
	if bytes.Equal(buf[:n], []byte("expected")) {
		c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"ok": true})
		return
	}
	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"mismatch": true})
}
